# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe the focused change and why it is useful for this early-stage
reproducible LLM inference benchmark scaffold.

## Scope

- [ ] Governance / project infrastructure
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Benchmark configuration
- [ ] Benchmark scripts or schemas
- [ ] Result artifacts
- [ ] Other:

## Reproducibility

List the commands, configs, and artifacts that support this change.

```bash

```

## Benchmark Claims

If this pull request includes benchmark results or performance discussion,
explain exactly what was measured and attach or link the supporting raw logs,
summary output, and run manifest.

If it does not include benchmark claims, say so here.

## OpenAI-Compatible Serving / L40S Context

If relevant, describe the serving stack, model identifier if public, streaming
mode, and hardware context such as L40S GPU details. If not relevant, say so.

## Limitations

What should reviewers not infer from this change?

## Safety Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change focused.
- [ ] I did not include API keys, bearer tokens, private endpoint URLs, or
      confidential data.
- [ ] I did not present unvalidated results as general benchmark claims.
- [ ] I documented dry-run, fake-server, or real-serving context where relevant.
- [ ] I ran the relevant checks or explained why they were not run.
